response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up portrait of a young boy with messy, spiky brown hair and flushed cheeks, wearing a dark shirt against a light-colored indoor wall. Harsh direct flash photography creates prominent red-eye and flat, unflattering illumination across the boy's face, producing stark shadows and an amateur snapshot aesthetic.
